description: A revocation feed arriving with a signature that does not verify against the trust bundle's delegated revocation-role key -- for instance a MITM of only the feed's own transport fabricating a validly-shaped 'nothing revoked' response while the rest of the index chain verifies normally -- MUST be refused at verification-order step 9 before its revoked_keys/revoked_artifacts are ever consulted; an unsigned or wrongly-signed feed is never treated as equivalent to a validly-signed 'nothing revoked' feed.
